note: In the apolar T4 lysozyme L99A cavity, binding affinity increases with added hydrophobic surface: benzene dG_bind approximately -5.2 kcal/mol, n-butylbenzene approximately -6.4 kcal/mol, so n-butylbenzene binds STRONGER than benzene. effect.direction is reported for the variant ligand (n-butylbenzene) relative to benzene. Matched crystal complexes: benzene PDB 4W52 (and 181L), n-butylbenzene PDB 4W57 (Merski et al. 2015). This task adds a protein-ligand affinity-direction pattern distinct from the mutation-stability and PPI-hotspot tasks.
